text: The general assembly shall make appropriations from the highway users tax fund for the expenses of the administration of this article.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-113 — Appropriations for administration of article

The general assembly shall make appropriations from the highway users tax fund for the expenses of the administration of this article.

subsections.text: The general assembly shall make appropriations from the highway users tax fund for the expenses of the administration of this article.
